      Finset.range_eq_Ico, Finset.sum_eq_sum_Ico_succ_bot (zero_le n)]
    · simp only [Nat.cast_zero, zero_add, Real.log_one, zero_add]
      let g := fun x => x * Real.log x - x
      have g_deriv : ∀ x ∈ Set.Ioi (0 : ℝ), HasDerivAt g (Real.log x) x := fun x hx ↦ by
        have h := HasDerivAt.mul (hasDerivAt_id x) (Real.hasDerivAt_log hx.ne')
        simpa using HasDerivAt.sub h (hasDerivAt_id x)
      calc
        1 + n * (Real.log n - 1) = g n - g 1 := by
          simp only [g, Real.log_one, mul_zero, sub_zero, sub_neg_eq_add]; ring
        _ = ∑ i in Finset.Ico 1 n, (g (i + 1) - g i) := by
           rw [Finset.sum_Ico_eq_sub _ (le_trans (by norm_num) (le_of_lt hn))]
           simp
        _ < ∑ i in Finset.Ico 1 n, Real.log (i + 1) := by
           refine Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty ⟨1, by simp [hn]⟩ (fun i hi ↦ ?_)
           simp only [Finset.mem_Ico] at hi
           have h1 : 0 < (i : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (le_trans (by norm_num) hi.1)
           rcases exists_hasDerivAt_eq_slope (fun x hx ↦ g_deriv x hx) 
             (by simp; linarith) (by simp; linarith) with ⟨c, ⟨hc1, hc2⟩, hc3⟩
           rw [hc3, Set.mem_Ioi.mp hc1]
           simp only [sub_add_cancel, div_one]
           apply Real.log_lt_log (Set.mem_Ioi.mp hc1)
           linarith
    · exact zero_lt_one.trans hn
  · intro i _
    simp only [ne_eq, Nat.cast_eq_zero, add_eq_zero, one_ne_zero, and_false, false_or]
    norm_cast
    linarith

refine' Nat.le_induction _ _ n hn
  · have h_base : (2 : ℝ) < e := by
      have := Real.add_one_lt_exp_of_ne_zero (1 : ℝ) one_ne_zero
      norm_num at this
      exact this
    rw [Nat.factorial_two, Nat.cast_two]
    rw [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_pow, sq e⁻¹, ← mul_assoc, mul_assoc e,
        mul_inv_cancel (Real.exp_pos 1).ne', mul_one, sq, ← mul_div_assoc, mul_comm]
    refine' (div_lt_iff (by positivity)).mpr _
    exact mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left h_base (by norm_num)
  · intro k hk ih
    have k_pos : 0 < (k : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (zero_lt_two.trans_le hk)
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
    calc
      ((k : ℝ) + 1) * k.factorial > (k + 1) * (e * (k / e) ^ k) :=
        mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left ih (by positivity)
      _ = e * ((k + 1) / e) ^ (k + 1) * (e / (1 + 1 / k) ^ k) := by
        field_simp [k_pos.ne', (Real.exp_pos 1).ne']
        rw [pow_succ]
        ring
      _ > e * ((k + 1) / e) ^ (k + 1) * 1 := by
        refine' mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left _ (by positivity)
        rw [one_lt_div (by positivity)]
        have : 1 + 1 / k < exp (1 / k) := Real.add_one_lt_exp_of_ne_zero (by positivity)
        refine' lt_of_lt_of_eq (pow_lt_pow_of_lt_left this (by positivity) (by norm_num)) _
        rw [← Real.exp_nat_mul, mul_one_div_cancel k_pos.ne', Real.exp_one]
        rfl
      _ = e * ((k + 1) / e) ^ (k + 1) := mul_one _

have n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by norm_cast; linarith
  rw [← log_lt_log_iff (by positivity) (by positivity), log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity),
      log_pow, log_div (by positivity) (by positivity), log_exp, e, log_exp, mul_sub, mul_one,
      add_sub, add_comm]
  let f (x : ℝ) := x * log x - x
  have key : ∀ k : ℕ, 1 ≤ k → f (k + 1) - f k < log (k + 1) := by
    intro k hk
    have k_pos : 0 < (k : ℝ) := by norm_cast; linarith
    simp only [f, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
    rw [add_mul, one_mul, add_sub_assoc, sub_sub_cancel, add_sub_assoc, ← sub_lt_iff_lt_add',
        sub_right_comm, ← mul_sub, ← log_div (by linarith) k_pos.ne', gt_iff_lt,
        ← div_lt_iff k_pos, add_div, div_self k_pos.ne', log_add_one_lt (inv_pos.2 k_pos)]
    simp only [Nat.cast_pos, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]; linarith
  have sum_lt : ∑ k in Finset.range (n - 1), (f (k + 1 + 1) - f (k + 1)) < ∑ k in Finset.range (n - 1), log (k + 1 + 1) := by
    apply Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty
    · use 0; simp; linarith
    · intro k hk; apply key; simp at hk; linarith
  rw [Finset.sum_range_sub (fun k => f (k + 1))] at sum_lt
  simp only [add_zero, tsub_add_cancel_of_le (Nat.succ_le_of_lt hn)] at sum_lt
  have f1 : f 1 = -1 := by simp [f]
  rw [f1, sub_neg_eq_add] at sum_lt
  convert sum_lt using 1
  · simp [f]
  · rw [← log_prod Finset.range_succ _ (fun _ _ => by positivity)]
    congr 1
    rw [Nat.factorial_eq_prod_range, Finset.prod_range_succ']
    norm_cast; simp

have n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (zero_lt_one.trans hn)
  rw [← log_lt_log_iff (by exact_mod_cast Nat.factorial_pos n) (by positivity)]
  rw [log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity), log_pow, log_div n_pos.ne' (exp_pos _).ne',
      e, log_exp, mul_sub, mul_one, add_sub, add_comm]
  let f (x : ℝ) := x * log x - x
  have hf : ∀ x ∈ Set.Ici 1, HasDerivAt f (log x) x := fun x hx ↦ by
    apply HasDerivAt.sub
    · simpa using (hasDerivAt_id x).mul (hasDerivAt_log (by linarith))
    · exact hasDerivAt_id x
  have h_diff : ∀ k ∈ Finset.range (n - 1), f (k + 2) - f (k + 1) < log (k + 2) := fun k _ ↦ by
    have h1 : 1 ≤ (k : ℝ) + 1 := by rw [le_add_iff_nonneg_left]; exact Nat.cast_nonneg k
    obtain ⟨c, hc, h_eq⟩ := exists_deriv_eq_slope f h1 (by norm_cast) (fun x hx ↦ (hf x (h1.trans hx.1)).differentiableAt)
    rw [h_eq]
    refine mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right ?_ (by simp)
    rw [(hf c (h1.trans hc.1.le)).deriv]
    exact log_lt_log (h1.trans_lt hc.1) hc.2
  have sum_lt := Finset.sum_lt_sum (fun k hk ↦ h_diff k hk) ⟨0, Finset.mem_range.mpr (tsub_pos_of_lt hn)⟩
  rw [Finset.sum_range_sub (fun k ↦ f (k + 1))] at sum_lt
  simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero, add_zero] at sum_lt
  rw [show f 1 = -1 by simp [f], sub_neg_eq_add] at sum_lt
  have h_fact : ∑ x in Finset.range (n - 1), log (x + 2) = log n.factorial := by
    rw [← Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_lt hn), Nat.factorial_eq_prod_range, Finset.prod_range_succ']
    rw [Nat.cast_zero, zero_add, Nat.cast_one, one_mul, Nat.add_sub_cancel, log_prod]
    · apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun x _ ↦ by simp)
    · intro x hx; simp; positivity
  rwa [h_fact, sub_add_cancel] at sum_lt

have n_pos : 0 < n := zero_lt_one.trans hn
  have n_posR : 0 < (n : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr n_pos
  rw [gt_iff_lt, e, ← Real.log_lt_log_iff (by positivity) (by positivity),
      Real.log_mul (Real.exp_pos _).ne' (pow_ne_zero _ (div_ne_zero n_posR.ne' (Real.exp_pos _).ne')),
      Real.log_pow, Real.log_div n_posR.ne' (Real.exp_pos _).ne', Real.log_exp]
  let f := fun (k : ℕ) => (k : ℝ) * Real.log k - k + 1
  have weak_bound : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k → f k ≤ Real.log k.factorial := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero => intro; contradiction
    | succ k ih =>
      intro hk
      rcases k.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | k_pos
      · simp [f]; norm_num
      · have k_posR : 0 < (k : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr k_pos
        rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul, Real.log_mul k_posR.ne' (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr (Nat.factorial_ne_zero _))]
        calc f (k + 1)
          _ = f k + Real.log (k + 1) + (k * Real.log (1 + 1 / k) - 1) := by
            simp [f]
            have : Real.log (k + 1) = Real.log k + Real.log (1 + 1 / k) := by
               rw [← Real.log_mul k_posR.ne' (by positivity)]; congr 1; field_simp
            rw [this]; ring
          _ ≤ Real.log k.factorial + Real.log (k + 1) + 0 := by
            apply add_le_add (add_le_add (ih k_pos) (le_refl _))
            rw [sub_nonpos, ← mul_one_div_cancel k_posR.ne', mul_assoc, mul_le_mul_left k_posR]
            exact Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (by positivity)
          _ = Real.log (k + 1) + Real.log k.factorial := by simp
  let m := n - 1
  have hm : 1 ≤ m := Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt hn
  have h_nm : n = m + 1 := Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_lt hn)
  have m_posR : 0 < (m : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (zero_lt_one.trans_le hm)
  rw [h_nm] at n_posR ⊢
  calc f (m + 1)
    _ = f m + Real.log (m + 1) + (m * Real.log (1 + 1 / m) - 1) := by
      simp [f]
      have : Real.log (m + 1) = Real.log m + Real.log (1 + 1 / m) := by
        rw [← Real.log_mul m_posR.ne' (by positivity)]; congr 1; field_simp
      rw [this]; ring
    _ < Real.log m.factorial + Real.log (m + 1) + 0 := by
      apply add_lt_add_of_le_of_lt (add_le_add (weak_bound m hm) (le_refl _))
      rw [sub_neg, ← mul_one_div_cancel m_posR.ne', mul_assoc, mul_lt_mul_left m_posR]
      apply Real.log_lt_sub_one_of_ne_one (by simp; linarith) (by positivity)
    _ = Real.log (m + 1).factorial := by
      simp; rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul, Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by norm_cast; exact Nat.factorial_ne_zero _), add_comm]

have n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (zero_lt_one.trans hn)
  rw [e, ← div_div, div_pow, ← exp_one, ← rpow_natCast, div_eq_mul_inv,
      mul_pow, inv_pow, ← Real.exp_nat_mul, ← exp_sub,
      gt_iff_lt, ← log_lt_log_iff (by positivity) (by positivity),
      log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity), log_exp, log_rpow n_pos,
      ← Finset.prod_range_add_one_eq_factorial, Nat.cast_prod, log_prod]
  · let f (x : ℝ) := x * log x - x
    have hf (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) : HasDerivAt f (log x) x := by
      have := (hasDerivAt_id x).mul (hasDerivAt_log (ne_of_gt hx)) |>.sub (hasDerivAt_id x)
      convert this using 1; field_simp [ne_of_gt hx]
    have sum_lt : ∑ k in Finset.Ico 1 n, (f (k + 1) - f k) < ∑ k in Finset.Ico 1 n, log (k + 1) := by
      refine Finset.sum_lt_sum (fun k hk ↦ ?_) ⟨1, Finset.mem_Ico.mpr ⟨le_refl 1, hn⟩⟩
      obtain ⟨k_ge_1, _⟩ := Finset.mem_Ico.mp hk
      have k_pos : 0 < (k : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr k_ge_1
      have sub_pos : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc (k : ℝ) (k + 1), 0 < x := fun x hx ↦ k_pos.trans_le hx.1
      obtain ⟨c, hc, h_mean⟩ := exists_deriv_eq_slope (fun x hx ↦ (hf x (sub_pos x hx)).differentiableAt)
        (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
      rw [h_mean, (hf c (sub_pos c ⟨hc.1, hc.2.le⟩)).deriv, add_sub_cancel_left, div_one]
      exact log_lt_log (sub_pos c ⟨hc.1, hc.2.le⟩) (hc.2.trans_lt (lt_add_one _))
    have telescoping : ∑ k in Finset.Ico 1 n, (f (k + 1) - f k) = f n - f 1 := by
       rw [eq_sub_iff_add_eq, add_comm, ← Finset.sum_range_one,
           ← Finset.sum_range_add_sum_Ico _ (le_of_lt hn)]
       simp [Finset.sum_range_sub, f]
    rw [telescoping] at sum_lt
    simp only [f, Nat.cast_one, log_one, mul_zero, zero_sub, sub_neg_eq_add] at sum_lt
    have : ∑ k in Finset.Ico 1 n, log (k + 1) = ∑ k in Finset.range n, log (k + 1) := by
       rw [Finset.sum_eq_sum_Ico_succ_bot (le_of_lt hn), Nat.cast_zero, zero_add, log_one, zero_add]
    rw [this] at sum_lt
    convert sum_lt using 1
    ring
  · intro x _; exact (Nat.cast_add_one_pos x).ne'
